name: Djinn Python
description: Python (via uv or pyenv) + pyright (Node-based LSP) + scip-python + selected package manager.

version.description: Python version. Python 3.14 is the current stable release (October 2025). Accepts anything uv/pyenv understand: `3.14`, `3.14.1`, `3.13`, etc.

pm.description: Package manager. One of: uv | poetry | pip | pdm.
